description: lib.rs:325 — ctx.sign(key_handle, digest.clone(), SignatureScheme::Null, validation). The closure passed to execute_with_nullauth_session is FnOnce. digest is not used after this call. Adding move to the inner closure would let digest be moved instead of cloned. The clone is small (~32 bytes SHA-256 digest) so this is not a performance issue, but it is a gratuitous allocation. KeyHandle and SignatureScheme::Null are both Copy, and validation is already moved, so adding move to the closure changes nothing else. Fix: change |ctx| to move |ctx| and remove .clone().
title: sign: gratuitous digest.clone() in FnOnce closure
